name: Partee Golf Simulator
about: ParTee Golf Simulator provides portable golf simulator rentals in Staten Island, New York, specializing in bringing realistic golf experiences to various events and locations. They offer state-of-the-art simulators with precise tracking technology and accurate swing analysis, allowing users to play on famous courses worldwide. The service is designed for parties, corporate events, and other gatherings, featuring a 4-hour rental package that includes a pro simulator, iPad, TV, projector, and impact screen setup handled by their professional team.
why_golfers_like_it: Portable setup allows golf experiences at any location
State-of-the-art technology with precise tracking and swing analysis
Playable on famous golf courses from around the world
Professional team handles setup and takedown hassle-free

food_and_drink.notes: Customers can bring their own food and drinks
Customers can bring their own alcohol (BYOB)

simulator_hardware.notes: Portable setup with iPad, TV, projector, and impact screen

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ doesn't specify whether customers need to bring their own clubs. It's recommended to contact ParTee Golf directly for clarification on equipment requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks to ParTee Golf events. They encourage customers to enjoy their favorite snacks and beverages during the experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The standard rental package includes 4 full hours of golf party time, which should be sufficient time to play multiple rounds or enjoy various activities on the simulator.

faq.question: Is ParTee Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, ParTee Golf is suitable for families and kids. They accommodate various events including birthday parties and can customize the experience for different age groups and skill levels.
